<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by ~/.claude/hooks/gen-invoke-commands.py from autonomous-skill-router.config.json — do not edit by hand; edit the config and re-run the generator. -->

This is the orchestrated **SPEC + PLAN + IMPLEMENT + DESIGN** suite (3-act). Execute the acts IN ORDER, top to bottom, without asking for permission except at marked CHECKPOINTs. Artifacts are files on disk — a broken chain resumes from the last artifact instead of restarting.

## ACT A — INTEL (do this yourself, no dispatch)

1. jcodemunch: `plan_turn` (query = the user's request) + `assemble_task_context` on the impacted area.
2. graphify: `graph_stats` + `query_graph` for the impacted area (freshness check; rebuild only if a guard reported STALE).
3. Read `CODEX.md` + the repo root `CLAUDE.md` if present (dox tree: root → target dir).
4. Produce the **BRIEF**: task, surfaces (FE/BE/infra), impacted layers, contracts at risk, relevant paths.

Every agent dispatched below receives this BRIEF — specialists start warm, never blind.

## ACT B — DISPATCH (in this order)

### SPEC → spec-architect

Spawn agent **spec-architect** (Agent tool, subagent_type "spec-architect", description prefix `[sonnet] `, model:"sonnet") with: the BRIEF + its reading list (the agent file already carries it; the same skills appear in the FALLBACK block below).
Wait for artifact `SPEC-*.md`.
**CHECKPOINT:** show the user a compact summary of the artifact and get approval before continuing to the next act.

### PLAN → planning-director

Spawn agent **planning-director** (Agent tool, subagent_type "planning-director", description prefix `[sonnet] `, model:"sonnet") with: the BRIEF + the prior act's artifact (`SPEC-*.md`) + its reading list (the agent file already carries it; the same skills appear in the FALLBACK block below).
Wait for artifact `plan-*.md`.
**CHECKPOINT:** show the user a compact summary of the artifact and get approval before continuing to the next act.

### IMPLEMENT → implementation-engineer  ⚠️ RUNS ON OPUS (mandatory)

> ⚠️ **RUNS ON OPUS (mandatory).** Every step of this **IMPLEMENT** task is done by OPUS, never a smaller model. Spawn all implement subagents with a `[opus]` description prefix **and** `model:"opus"` (opus-guard.py then pins them to OPUS). If the main loop is not already on OPUS, delegate the work to a OPUS subagent instead of doing it inline. Read-only helpers (search/explore/lint/docs) may keep their default model.

**REQUIRES a PLAN artifact (`plan-*.md`).** Use the one produced above if the PLAN act ran. If none exists on disk, do NOT stop and do NOT ask — auto-run a mini planning act first: dispatch **planning-director** (`[sonnet]` prefix) with the BRIEF to produce it, then continue.

Spawn agent **implementation-engineer** (Agent tool, subagent_type "implementation-engineer", description prefix `[opus] `, model:"opus") with: the BRIEF + the prior act's artifact (`plan-*.md`) + its reading list (the agent file already carries it; the same skills appear in the FALLBACK block below).
Wait for artifact `IMPL-REPORT.md`.

### DESIGN → frontend-uiux-designer

Spawn agent **frontend-uiux-designer** (Agent tool, subagent_type "frontend-uiux-designer", description prefix `[opus] `, model:"opus") with: the BRIEF + the prior act's artifact (`IMPL-REPORT.md`) + its reading list (the agent file already carries it; the same skills appear in the FALLBACK block below).
Wait for artifact `DESIGN-REPORT.md`.

## ACT C — CLOSE (automatic — do not skip, do not ask)

This suite mutates code, so the closers run unconditionally. Dispatch each (`[sonnet]` prefix) with the BRIEF + the diff scope, in order:

1. **deadcode-reaper** — change-scoped dead-code sweep (your diff only) → `REAP-REPORT.md`
2. **docs-sync-agent** — Phase-7 doc sync — CLAUDE.md tree, server_docs/frontend_docs, CODEX → `DOCS-SYNC-REPORT.md`
3. **qa-verifier** — end-to-end functional verification of what shipped → `VERIFY-REPORT.md`
4. **security-sentinel** (conditional) — dispatch ONLY when the diff touches auth/input/API-ish paths (see `orchestration.security_trigger_globs` in the router config) → `SECURITY-REPORT.md`

Each closer writes its report. Then give the user ONE summary: what shipped, evidence, artifact paths.

## FALLBACK — legacy inline mode

Use ONLY if agent dispatch is unavailable (offline, subagent limits, Agent tool missing). Degrade gracefully: invoke the skills below yourself via the Skill tool, in order, and execute every act sequentially in this context. Never silently drop a category.
